title: unused-receiver
description: "Detect unused method receivers."
sidebar:
  badge:

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Detect unused method receivers. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func (client *Client) Version() string { return version }
```

## Good

```go
func (client *Client) Send() { client.flush() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only unused-receiver`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
